opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.before_state: Scratched, pet-hair-covered sofa with stains and worn armrests
opportunities.after_state: Smooth, fitted cover in neutral tone — looks like a brand-new couch
opportunities.why_now: Spring shedding season drives pet owners to search couch protection solutions at peak volume.

opportunities.specific_product: Bamboo expandable under-sink organizer with pull-out drawer
opportunities.transformation_hook: Chaotic bathroom cabinet → spa storage for $34
opportunities.before_state: Random cleaning bottles, tangled cords, and wasted dead space under the sink
opportunities.after_state: Tiered bamboo shelves with labeled bins — every product visible and accessible
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning content is peaking in April, and bathroom organization is the #1 searched home category this week.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper adjustable pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Waking up with neck pain → best sleep of your life for $89
opportunities.before_state: Flat, yellowed pillow causing morning neck stiffness and poor sleep
opportunities.after_state: Ergonomic curved pillow perfectly supporting side sleeper posture — wake up pain-free
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness content sees strong spring engagement as people reset routines after winter.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia Damascus-style chef knife set with block
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dull dollar-store knives → pro kitchen setup for $59
opportunities.before_state: Mismatched, dull knives scattered in a drawer — prep work is slow and dangerous
opportunities.after_state: Gleaming knife block on the counter with razor-sharp blades — kitchen looks and functions like a pro's
opportunities.why_now: Spring cooking content spikes as people return to home cooking after winter takeout habits.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products velvet accent chair with gold legs
opportunities.transformation_hook: Empty bedroom corner → designer reading nook for $129
opportunities.before_state: Bare, wasted bedroom corner with nothing but clutter and a floor lamp
opportunities.after_state: Plush velvet chair with throw blanket creating a styled, cozy reading corner
opportunities.why_now: Home refresh spending rises in April as tax refunds land and people invest in visible room upgrades.
